name: Tina CMS
description: Open-source, Git-backed headless CMS with visual editing and GraphQL API

description.value: Open-source, Git-backed headless CMS with visual editing and GraphQL API

initial-release.comment: Announced at JAMstack Conf San Francisco by Forestry.io team

cms-type.comment: API-first, Git-backed; no built-in frontend rendering

deployment-model.comment: Self-hosted option available; TinaCloud is the managed SaaS offering

database-support.comment: Git is source of truth; database acts as cache. Self-hosted supports MongoDB, Postgres, Redis/Vercel KV

api-type.comment: GraphQL-native API for querying Markdown content

multi-tenancy.comment: Each project is separate; no built-in multi-site from single installation

static-site-generation.comment: Designed for JAMstack; works with SSG frameworks like Astro, Hugo, Next.js, Gatsby

edge-deployment.comment: Compatible with serverless environments like Vercel and Netlify edge functions

content-types.comment: Define collections with custom schemas in tina/config.ts

field-types.comment: String, Number, DateTime, Boolean, Image, Reference, Object (components), Rich-text with MDX support

content-relationships.comment: Reference field type for linking documents

nested-components.comment: Object fields with templates support nested, reusable components

localization.comment: Internationalization support documented for Next.js integration

content-validation.comment: ui.validate functions for custom validation rules

embedded-interactives.comment: MDX support allows embedding React components within content

content-versioning.comment: Git-based versioning; full commit history available

draft-publish.comment: Draft document support with marking capabilities

scheduled-publishing.comment: No built-in scheduled publishing; would require custom implementation

approval-workflows.comment: Editorial Workflow via GitHub pull requests; available in Team Plus tier and above

content-locking.comment: Git-based conflict resolution rather than explicit content locking

audit-logging.comment: Git commit history provides audit trail of all changes

media-library.comment: Built-in media management with multiple storage options

image-transformations.comment: No built-in transformations; relies on external services like Cloudinary

external-media-storage.comment: AWS S3, Cloudinary, DigitalOcean Spaces supported

video-support.comment: Media fields support various file types including video

svg-support.comment: SVG files supported in media library

folder-organization.comment: Media can be organized in folders

role-based-access.comment: 2 roles on Free/Team, 3 roles on Business, custom on Enterprise

granular-permissions.comment: Role-based but not field-level permissions; granular permissions in beta for Business tier

sso-saml.comment: SSO available exclusively for Enterprise customers

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaboration, editorial workflow for teams

audience-restrictions.comment: No built-in audience segmentation or gated content features

typescript-sdk.comment: TypeScript-first; 97.6% TypeScript codebase with full type support

cli-tools.comment: @tinacms/cli for project setup, backend configuration, and management

local-development.comment: Full local development support with live editing

plugin-system.comment: Custom field components, custom form components, extensible architecture

admin-ui-customization.comment: Customizable sidebar, forms, and field components

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive docs with guides, API reference, migration guides, and framework-specific tutorials

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official support for Next.js, Astro, Hugo, Jekyll; Remix via community. Gatsby deprecated.

search-integration.comment: No built-in search; GraphQL queries can filter but no full-text search integration

preview-mode.comment: Visual editing with real-time preview via useTina hook; side-by-side editor and site view

analytics-integration.comment: No built-in analytics; standard frontend analytics can be added separately

ai-features.comment: AI Features in beta, available from Team Plus tier

cdn-included.comment: TinaCloud includes CDN for asset delivery

response-caching.comment: Database acts as cache layer for GraphQL API responses

rate-limits.comment: Unlimited documents on all plans; self-hosted has no API limits

global-regions.comment: No documented multi-region deployment for TinaCloud

free-tier.comment: Free forever tier with 2 users, community support

pricing-model.comment: Free tier available; paid plans are per-seat ($24-249/mo base, additional seats $9-18/mo)

commercial-support.comment: Team, Business, and Enterprise support tiers available

enterprise-features.comment: Enterprise tier includes SSO, GitHub Enterprise support, dedicated account manager, custom pricing
